critique: Local repo hygiene was the noisiest source (5 of 7 findings, mostly low-stakes uncommitted scratch files); GitHub branch-staleness required one API call per branch which will not scale past ~10-15 repos - cache last-commit dates between runs or use a single Search API query instead.

Two prior High Priority items self-resolved (TarotApp push, Miriels-publish) - pruned; local repo hygiene still the noisiest source (4 of 8 findings, all low-stakes dirty files); new finding: spend-summary.mjs reports today+tomorrow instead of yesterday+today (UTC date bug) - fix the script so the spend threshold check has a valid window; also start recording daily output-token totals in run-log notes so the 2x-median flag has a baseline.
